reviews.comment:
Suele haber gente para cargar combustible pero atienden rápido y muy bien 😊 también en el café de la estación atienden amablemente, al menos de tarde 💪

(Translated by Google)
It's usually busy waiting to fill up, but they serve you quickly and very well 😊 The staff at the station's café are also friendly, at least in the afternoon 💪

reviews.comment:
Excelente, linda limpieza, buena atención, baños en buen estado y rico.
En lo personal siento que las hamburguesa de este lugar son riquísimas, esta hamburguesa es mucho mas rica que otros restaurantes, los precios son normales.
Excelente, muy recomendado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, very clean, good service, well-maintained restrooms, and delicious food.
Personally, I think the burgers here are amazing. This burger is much better than at other restaurants, and the prices are reasonable.
Excellent, highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlallmSXhRRRAB
